_comment: WARNING: DO NOT EDIT. FILE AUTOMATICALLY GENERATED BY PANEL - reviactyl.app
name: Velocity
author: authors@reviactyl.app
description: Velocity is the modern, high-performance proxy. Designed with performance and stability in mind, it’s a full alternative to Waterfall with its own plugin ecosystem.

installation.script:
#!/bin/ash
# Velocity Proxy Installation Script
# Server Files: /mnt/server

PROJECT="velocity"
USER_AGENT="Reviactyl-Panel/v26 (reviactyl.app)"
API_BASE="https://fill.papermc.io/v3"

cd /mnt/server

# 1. Determine Version
if [[ -z ${VELOCITY_VERSION} ]] || [[ ${VELOCITY_VERSION} == "latest" ]]; then
    echo -e "Fetching latest version for ${PROJECT}..."
    # Extracts the first version from the first version group
    VELOCITY_VERSION=$(curl -s -H "User-Agent: $USER_AGENT" ${API_BASE}/projects/${PROJECT} | jq -r '.versions | to_entries[0] | .value[0]')
fi

# 2. Get Build Information
echo -e "Checking builds for version: ${VELOCITY_VERSION}"
BUILDS_RESPONSE=$(curl -s -H "User-Agent: $USER_AGENT" ${API_BASE}/projects/${PROJECT}/versions/${VELOCITY_VERSION}/builds)

# Check for API errors
if echo "$BUILDS_RESPONSE" | jq -e '.ok == false' > /dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "Error from API: $(echo "$BUILDS_RESPONSE" | jq -r '.message')"
    exit 1
fi

# 3. Select Build (Specific Number vs Latest Stable)
if [[ -n "${BUILD_NUMBER}" ]] && [[ "${BUILD_NUMBER}" != "latest" ]]; then
    echo -e "Attempting to use specific build: ${BUILD_NUMBER}"
    DOWNLOAD_URL=$(echo "$BUILDS_RESPONSE" | jq -r --arg BUILD "$BUILD_NUMBER" '.[] | select(.id | tostring == $BUILD) | .downloads."proxy:default".url // .downloads."server:default".url')
else
    echo -e "Searching for latest STABLE build..."
    # Note: Velocity components are usually labeled "proxy:default" in v3, but we fallback to "server:default"
    DOWNLOAD_URL=$(echo "$BUILDS_RESPONSE" | jq -r 'first(.[] | select(.channel == "STABLE") | .downloads."proxy:default".url // .downloads."server:default".url) // "null"')
fi

# 4. Validation and Download
if [[ "${DOWNLOAD_URL}" == "null" ]] || [[ -z "${DOWNLOAD_URL}" ]]; then
    echo -e "Could not find a valid stable download for ${PROJECT} ${VELOCITY_VERSION}."
    exit 1
fi

if [[ -f ${SERVER_JARFILE} ]]; then
    mv ${SERVER_JARFILE} ${SERVER_JARFILE}.old
fi

echo -e "Downloading from: ${DOWNLOAD_URL}"
curl -L -H "User-Agent: $USER_AGENT" -o ${SERVER_JARFILE} "${DOWNLOAD_URL}"

# 5. Configuration Setup
if [[ ! -f velocity.toml ]]; then
    echo -e "Downloading default velocity config..."
    curl -s https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PaperMC/Velocity/refs/heads/dev/3.0.0/proxy/src/main/resources/default-velocity.toml -o velocity.toml
fi

if [[ ! -f forwarding.secret ]]; then
    echo -e "Creating forwarding secret..."
    date +%s | sha256sum | base64 | head -c 12 > forwarding.secret
fi

echo -e "Install complete."

variables.name: Velocity Version
variables.description:
The Velocity Proxy version to download.

Set to 'latest ' the download the last stable build.

variables.name: Server Jar File
variables.description:
Server Jarfile, by default this is set to 'velocity.jar'.
Set it to otherwise if you wish to have a different jarfile name.

variables.name: Download Path
variables.description: A URL to use to download a server.jar rather than the ones in the install script. This is not user viewable.

variables.name: Build Number
variables.description:
The build number for the velocity release.

Leave at latest to always get the latest version. Invalid versions will default to latest.
